inputs.label: Scale Length
inputs.businessContext: Distance from nut to bridge saddle, typically 628-660 mm for electric guitars.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance from nut to bridge saddle, typically 628-660 mm for electric guitars.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Somundan köprü eyerine mesafe, elektro gitarlar için tipik olarak 628-660 mm.
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand von Sattel zu Steg, typischerweise 628–660 mm bei E-Gitarren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance du sillet de tête au sillet de chevalet, généralement 628-660 mm pour les guitares électriques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia desde la cejilla al puente, típicamente 628-660 mm para guitarras eléctricas.

inputs.label: Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Target pitch frequency, e.g., E2=82.41 Hz, A2=110 Hz.

businessContext_i18n.en: Target pitch frequency, e.g., E2=82.41 Hz, A2=110 Hz.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hedef perde frekansı, örn. E2=82.41 Hz, A2=110 Hz.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zieltonfrequenz, z. B. E2=82,41 Hz, A2=110 Hz.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence de hauteur cible, ex. Mi2=82,41 Hz, La2=110 Hz.
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia objetivo del tono, ej., E2=82.41 Hz, A2=110 Hz.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre de la corde, ex. 0,046 pouce ≈ 1,17 mm.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro de la cuerda, ej., 0.046 pulgadas ≈ 1.17 mm.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
